name: Training Data Representative
description: Data used as input for AI systems is relevant, sufficient and representative, and algorithms are trained and validated on accurate, comprehensive and sufficiently broad datasets.
rationale: ESMA ¶12: firms should ensure the data used as input is relevant, sufficient and representative, and that algorithms are trained and validated on accurate and comprehensive datasets.
source: ESMA Public Statement ESMA35-335435667-5924 — On the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the provision of retail investment services (30 May 2024), mapping AI use onto MiFID II obligations.
